intended_use: AI-Rad Companion Brain MR is a post-processing image analysis software that assists clinicians in viewing, analyzing, and evaluating MR brain images. AI-Rad Companion Brain MR provides the following f
intended_use_full: AI-Rad Companion Brain MR is a post-processing image analysis software that assists clinicians in viewing, analyzing, and evaluating MR brain images. AI-Rad Companion Brain MR provides the following functionalities: Automated segmentation and quantitative analysis of individual brain structures and white matter hyperintensities; Quantitative comparison of brain structure with normative data from a healthy population; Presentation of results of reporting that includes all numerical values as well as visualization of these results
target_condition: brain abnormalities including white matter hyperintensities; applications in Multiple Sclerosis, Alzheimer's disease, and cognitive impairment
ground_truth: Manual annotations by three radiologists (annotator, reviewer, and clinical expert) per case, with experts randomly assigned to minimize annotation bias
other_metrics: Volumetric Segmentation Accuracy: PCC 0.98 (95% CI [0.97,0.99]), ICC 0.97 (95% CI [0.96,0.98]); Voxel-wise Segmentation Accuracy: Mean Dice score 0.60 (95% CI [0.53,0.63]); WMH Lesion-wise Segmentation Accuracy: Mean F1-score 0.60 (95% CI [0.57,0.64]); Reproducibility: Dice 0.79 (95% CI [0.77,0.81])
